title: ligustrum sinense var. rugosulum
intro: Ligustrum sinense var. rugosulum, also known as Chinese Privet, is a deciduous shrub native to China, belonging to the Oleaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ligustrum sinense var. rugosulum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of fever and fatigue. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and crushing its leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
